general_notes:
1. EXTERIOR DOORS REQUIRED TO BE ACCESSIBLE = 80% OF ALL PUBLIC ENTRANCES
A. DOOR NO. 100, 103, & 110.1 TO BE ACCESSIBLE 32" MIN CLEARANCE (SEE CODE PLANS)
B. THRESHOLD - MAX 1/2" AND MAX SLOPE OF 1:2
C. DOOR HARDWARE AT MAX 48" HEIGHT
2. APPROVED SIGNS, BASED ON THE APO SIGN BOOK SHALL BE UTILIZED. THIS SIGN BOOK WILL BE PROVIDED TO THE GC.
3. ALL EXTERIOR DOOR FRAMES TO BE CAULKED AT ENTIRE LENGHT OF HEAD AND JAMB - INTERIOR & EXTERIOR SIDES.

4. EXTERIOR H.M. TYPICAL : DOOR FRAME - 14 GA DOOR - 16GA INSULATED
INTERIOR H.M. TYPICAL : DOOR FRAME - 16 GA DOOR - 18GA
5. OBSCURE GLASS, FROSTED FINISH TO WASHROOM INTERIOR.
10. PROVIDE PANIC HARDWARE ON INTERIOR SIDE OF DOOR.

11. PROVIDE PROMINENT TOILET ROOM IDENTIFICATION SIGNAGE AND THE INTERNATIONAL SYMBOL FOR ACCESSIBLITY, MOUNTING HEIGHT TO BE 60" A.F.F. TO THE CENTERLINE OF THE SIGN AND 2" OFF THE DOOR FRAME (REFER TO SHEET T3.0)
12. PROVIDE TACTILE "EXIT" SIGNAGE ADJACENT TO EACH EXIT PASSAGEWAY AND EXIT DISCHARGE DOOR.
13. ALL DOORS SUPPLIED AND INSTALLED BY GC.

14. STANLEY RUSH 500 SERIES REVOLVING DOOR, FOUR WING, EXPOSED LOWER COLLAPSING MECH., OVERHEAD MANUAL SPEED CONTROL, DEADBOLT SLIDER, 3" HEAD ENCLOSURE TO MATCH DOOR.
PROVIDE EXTENDED CANOPY TO INFILL REMAINDER SPACE WITHIN STOREFRONT SYSTEM.
15. TORMAX TX9200SM AUTOMATIC SERVICE SLIDING DOOR
16. PAINT EXTERIOR DOORS - PT.07 - SW9183 - DARK CLOVE

17. OPENING PROTECTIVES IN FIRE-RESISTANCE RATED ASSEMBLIES SHALL BE INSPECTED AND MAINTAINED IN ACCORDANCE WITH NFPA 80 AND NFPA 105. OPENINGS IN SMOKE PARTITIONS SHALL BE INSPECTED AND MAINTAINED IN ACCORDANCE WITH NFPA 105. FIRE DOORS AND SMOKE AND DRAFT CONTROL DOOR SHALL NOT BE BLOCKED, OBSTRUCTED, OR OTHERWISE MADE INOPERABLE. FUSIBLE LINKS SHALL BE REPLACED PROMPTLY WHENEVER FUSED OR DAMAGED. OPENING PROTECTTIVES AND SMOKE AND DRAFT CONTROL DOORS SHALL NOT BE MODIFIED.
"A COMPREHENSIVE REPORT FROM CERTIFIED THIRD PARTY CONTRACTOR IS REQUIRED PRIOR TO A FINAL FIRE INSPECTION. THIS REPORT SHALL STATE THAT ALL AFOREMENTIONED PROTECTIVE OPENINGS COMPLY WITH THE APPROPRIATE STANDARD."
NOTE: T.G. INDICATES TEMPERED GLASS PER IBC 2406

estimator_notes: Keying notes captured from the drawings (7 line(s)); verify keyway, master structure, cylinder format and key counts.
17 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
19 hardware set(s) identified; 10 have a complete extracted item list.
18 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
17 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
